summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FrameFlow P0 stability fixes. All features tested are working correctly: authentication persistence with JWT/localStorage, Templates page loads with all 12 templates, navigation between all 10 pages works without white screens, login/signup flow functions correctly, loading states appear while fetching data, error handling displays properly, protected routes redirect to auth, user info persists in sidebar, and logout clears session.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext implementation is well-structured with proper localStorage persistence and token validation
API service uses axios interceptors correctly for automatic token attachment and 401 handling
TemplatesPage now has the getTypeIcon function properly defined
ErrorBoundary and LoadingSpinner components are properly implemented
All data-testid attributes are present for interactive elements
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 stability fixes are complete and verified. All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend navigation to all 10 pages works. Auth persistence verified with page refresh. Templates page shows 12 template cards. Error toasts working for invalid credentials. Loading spinners appear during data fetch. Logout properly clears localStorage and redirects.

features_verified.authentication_persistence: PASS - Token persists in localStorage, user stays logged in after page refresh
features_verified.templates_page: PASS - Loads correctly with 12 template cards, Use Template button navigates to Create Content
features_verified.navigation_no_white_screens: PASS - All 10 sidebar navigation items work without white screens
features_verified.login_signup_flow: PASS - Login works with valid credentials, error toast shown for invalid credentials
features_verified.loading_states: PASS - Loading spinner visible during data fetching (e.g., 'Loading campaigns...')
features_verified.error_handling: PASS - Toast notifications display errors properly (e.g., 'Invalid credentials')
features_verified.protected_routes_redirect: PASS - Accessing /dashboard without login redirects to /auth
features_verified.user_info_persists_sidebar: PASS - User name and email persist in sidebar after navigation and refresh
features_verified.logout_functionality: PASS - Clears localStorage and redirects to landing/auth page
